# AI Skills Generator

## About
AISkillsGenerator.com helps workers and professionals build practical AI skills without a computer science degree. We publish actionable guides, learning plans, and career content for the AI-powered workforce.

## Topics
- Building AI skills without coding background
- AI career development
- Prompt writing and engineering
- AI productivity tools
- Freelancing with AI skills
- Workforce AI readiness
- 30-day AI learning plans

- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/ : Homepage
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog : Blog

- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/7-ai-skills-that-will-get-you-hired-2026 : 7 AI Skills That Will Get You Hired in 2026
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/use-ai-tools-to-10x-work-output : Use AI Tools to 10x Your Work Output
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/ai-prompt-writing-101 : AI Prompt Writing 101
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/learn-ai-skills-fast-30-day-plan : Learn AI Skills Fast — 30-Day Plan
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/ai-skills-gap-workers-already-behind : The AI Skills Gap — Workers Are Already Behind
- https://aiskillsgenerator.com/blog/turn-ai-skills-into-freelance-income : Turn AI Skills Into Freelance Income
